spirit:component.spirit:name: haifuraiya_rx_axi

spirit:register.spirit:name: VERSION
spirit:register.spirit:description: Major.minor.patch version of the IP. Reads 0x00010000 = v0.1.0.

spirit:register.spirit:name: CONTROL
spirit:register.spirit:description: Control register. Bit 0: soft reset (sticky). Bit 1: enable.

spirit:register.spirit:name: STATUS
spirit:register.spirit:description: Status register. Bit 0: ready. Bit 1: overflow sticky. Bit 2: backpressure sticky.

spirit:register.spirit:name: FRAME_COUNT
spirit:register.spirit:description: Number of output frames emitted since reset. 32-bit counter, wraps at 2^32.

spirit:register.spirit:name: DROPPED_FRAMES
spirit:register.spirit:description: Number of frames lost to downstream FIFO overflow since reset.

spirit:register.spirit:name: OUTPUT_SHIFT
spirit:register.spirit:description: Right-shift applied to the 40-bit channelizer output before AXIS requantization. Valid 0..24. Default 16.

spirit:register.spirit:name: POWER_ALPHA1
spirit:register.spirit:description: First-stage EMA alpha coefficient (fast tracker). Default targets a 64-sample time constant.

spirit:register.spirit:name: POWER_ALPHA2
spirit:register.spirit:description: Second-stage EMA alpha coefficient (slow smoother). Default targets a 4096-sample time constant.

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_0
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 0 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_1
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 1 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_2
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 2 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_3
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 3 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_4
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 4 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_5
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 5 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_6
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 6 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_7
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 7 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_8
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 8 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_9
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 9 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_10
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 10 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_11
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 11 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_12
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 12 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_13
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 13 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_14
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 14 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_15
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 15 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_16
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 16 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_17
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 17 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_18
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 18 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_19
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 19 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_20
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 20 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_21
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 21 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_22
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 22 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_23
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 23 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_24
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 24 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_25
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 25 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_26
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 26 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_27
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 27 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_28
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 28 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_29
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 29 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_30
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 30 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_31
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 31 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_32
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 32 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_33
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 33 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_34
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 34 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_35
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 35 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_36
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 36 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_37
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 37 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_38
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 38 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_39
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 39 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_40
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 40 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_41
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 41 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_42
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 42 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_43
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 43 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_44
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 44 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_45
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 45 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_46
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 46 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_47
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 47 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_48
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 48 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_49
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 49 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_50
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 50 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_51
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 51 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_52
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 52 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_53
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 53 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_54
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 54 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_55
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 55 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_56
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 56 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_57
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 57 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_58
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 58 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_59
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 59 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_60
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 60 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_61
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 61 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_62
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 62 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: CHANNEL_POWER_63
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integrated power detector output for channel 63 (32-bit unsigned).

spirit:register.spirit:name: DEMOD_VERSION
spirit:register.spirit:description: Major.minor.patch version. Reads 0x00050000 = v0.5.0.

spirit:register.spirit:name: DEMOD_CONTROL
spirit:register.spirit:description: Bit 0: rx_invert (soft-bit polarity). Reset 1.

spirit:register.spirit:name: FREQ_WORD_F1
spirit:register.spirit:description: Complex lower tone phase increment. Reset 0xFA732DF5.

spirit:register.spirit:name: FREQ_WORD_F2
spirit:register.spirit:description: Complex upper tone phase increment. Reset 0x058CD20B.

spirit:register.spirit:name: LPF_P_GAIN
spirit:register.spirit:description: Loop-filter proportional gain [23:0]. Reset 0x7FFFFF.

spirit:register.spirit:name: LPF_I_GAIN
spirit:register.spirit:description: Loop-filter integral gain [23:0]. Reset 0x7FFFFF.

spirit:register.spirit:name: LPF_ALPHA
spirit:register.spirit:description: Loop-filter alpha [23:0]. Reset 0x000000.

spirit:register.spirit:name: LPF_P_SHIFT
spirit:register.spirit:description: Proportional shift [7:0]. Reset 20 (0x14).

spirit:register.spirit:name: LPF_I_SHIFT
spirit:register.spirit:description: Integral shift [7:0]. Reset 29 (0x1D).

spirit:register.spirit:name: SYM_LOCK_COUNT
spirit:register.spirit:description: Symbol lock count [9:0]. Reset 128.

spirit:register.spirit:name: SYM_LOCK_THRESHOLD
spirit:register.spirit:description: Symbol lock threshold [15:0]. Reset 8.

spirit:register.spirit:name: GAIN_MANUAL
spirit:register.spirit:description: Manual AGC gain [15:0]. Reset 0x0C00.

spirit:register.spirit:name: GAIN_CURRENT
spirit:register.spirit:description: Current AGC gain [15:0]. Live.

spirit:register.spirit:name: DEMOD_STATUS
spirit:register.spirit:description: Bit 0: frame_sync_locked. Bit 1: cst_lock_f1. Bit 2: cst_lock_f2.

spirit:register.spirit:name: FRAMES_RECEIVED
spirit:register.spirit:description: Frames decoded since reset.

spirit:register.spirit:name: FS_HUNT_THRESH
spirit:register.spirit:description: Frame-sync hunt correlation threshold [31:0]. Reset 0x00009470.

spirit:register.spirit:name: FS_VERIFY_THRESH
spirit:register.spirit:description: Frame-sync verify correlation threshold [31:0]. Reset 0x00005DC0 (24000).

spirit:register.spirit:name: QUANT_THR_1
spirit:register.spirit:description: Soft-bit quantizer threshold 1 [15:0]. Reset 0x01F4 (500).

spirit:register.spirit:name: QUANT_THR_2
spirit:register.spirit:description: Soft-bit quantizer threshold 2 [15:0]. Reset 0x0578 (1400).

spirit:register.spirit:name: QUANT_THR_3
spirit:register.spirit:description: Soft-bit quantizer threshold 3 [15:0]. Reset 0x0AF8 (2800).

spirit:register.spirit:name: DEMOD_INIT
spirit:register.spirit:description: Bit 0: demod_init. 1 = hold demod in synchronous init. Reset 0.

spirit:register.spirit:name: LOOP_CTRL
spirit:register.spirit:description: Bit 0: lpf_freeze. Bit 1: lpf_zero. Bit 2: rx_enable. Reset rx_enable=1.

spirit:register.spirit:name: RX_SAMPLE_DISCARD
spirit:register.spirit:description: Input samples discarded after enable [7:0]. Reset 0x00.

spirit:register.spirit:name: F1_NCO_ADJUST
spirit:register.spirit:description: F1 Costas NCO frequency adjust. Live telemetry.

spirit:register.spirit:name: F2_NCO_ADJUST
spirit:register.spirit:description: F2 Costas NCO frequency adjust. Live telemetry.

spirit:register.spirit:name: F1_ERROR
spirit:register.spirit:description: F1 Costas phase error. Live telemetry.

spirit:register.spirit:name: F2_ERROR
spirit:register.spirit:description: F2 Costas phase error. Live telemetry.

spirit:register.spirit:name: LPF_ACCUM_F1
spirit:register.spirit:description: F1 loop-filter accumulator. Live telemetry.

spirit:register.spirit:name: LPF_ACCUM_F2
spirit:register.spirit:description: F2 loop-filter accumulator. Live telemetry.

spirit:register.spirit:name: CST_LOCKTIME_F1
spirit:register.spirit:description: F1 Costas lock dwell time [15:0]. Live telemetry.

spirit:register.spirit:name: CST_LOCKTIME_F2
spirit:register.spirit:description: F2 Costas lock dwell time [15:0]. Live telemetry.

spirit:register.spirit:name: LOCK_STATUS
spirit:register.spirit:description: Bit 0: cst_lock_f1. Bit 1: cst_lock_f2. Bit 2: cst_unlock_f1. Bit 3: cst_unlock_f2.

spirit:register.spirit:name: CST_ACC_I_F1
spirit:register.spirit:description: F1 Costas I accumulator. Live telemetry.

spirit:register.spirit:name: CST_ACC_Q_F1
spirit:register.spirit:description: F1 Costas Q accumulator. Live telemetry.

spirit:register.spirit:name: CST_IQ_DELTA_F1
spirit:register.spirit:description: F1 Costas I/Q delta. Live telemetry.

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: C_S_AXI_CTRL_ADDR_WIDTH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:displayName: C S Axi Ctrl Addr Width

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: C_S_AXI_DEMOD_ADDR_WIDTH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:displayName: C S Axi Demod Addr Width

spirit:component.spirit:description: Haifuraiya OPV MSK receiver: 64-channel polyphase channelizer feeding an MSK demodulator and soft-decision frame sync. AXI-Lite control of demod parameters; emits 3-bit soft bits over AXI-Stream.

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: C_S_AXI_CTRL_ADDR_WIDTH
spirit:parameter.spirit:displayName: C S Axi Ctrl Addr Width

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: C_S_AXI_DEMOD_ADDR_WIDTH
spirit:parameter.spirit:displayName: C S Axi Demod Addr Width
